name: Ability Capsule
desc: Swaps a Pokémon between its two regular abilities.

name: Ability Patch
desc: Changes a Pokémon's ability to its Hidden Ability.

name: Ability Shield
desc: Prevents the holder's ability from being changed or suppressed.

name: Absorb Bulb
desc: One-use item boosting Special Attack after being hit by a Water move.

name: Air Balloon
desc: Grants Ground-type immunity until popped by a hit.

name: Antidote
desc: Cures poison.

name: Apricorn
desc: Grows in 7 colors on Apricorn Trees — the core ingredient for every basic Poké Ball.

name: Aprijuice
desc: A drink crafted from Apricorns, used in some recipes and to attract Pokémon.

name: Assault Vest
desc: Boosts Special Defense but prevents using status moves.

name: Auspicious Armor
desc: Evolves Charcadet → Armarouge.

name: Awakening
desc: Cures sleep.

name: Berry
desc: Grow on Berry Trees — used for cooking, held-item strategies, and curing status conditions.

name: Berry Juice
desc: Restores 20 HP when consumed.

name: Big Malasada
desc: An Alola regional snack that heals and cures status.

name: Big Root
desc: Held item that boosts HP recovered from draining moves like Giga Drain.

name: Binding Band
desc: Increases damage dealt by binding/trapping moves.

name: Black Augurite
desc: Evolution item for Scyther → Kleavor (Legends: Arceus method).

name: Black Belt
desc: Held item boosting Fighting-type moves.

name: Black Glasses
desc: Held item boosting Dark-type moves.

name: Black Sludge
desc: Restores HP every turn for Poison types, damages others.

name: Blunder Policy
desc: Sharply boosts Speed after one of the holder's moves misses.

name: Braised Vivichoke
desc: A cooked Vivichoke dish.

name: Bright Powder
desc: Slightly lowers the accuracy of moves used against the holder.

name: Burn Heal
desc: Cures burn.

name: Candied Apple
desc: A sweet food item.

name: Candied Berries
desc: A sweet food item made from Berries.

name: Casteliacone
desc: A Unova regional snack food.

name: Cell Battery
desc: One-use item boosting Attack after being hit by an Electric move.

name: Charcoal Stick
desc: Held item boosting Fire-type moves.

name: Chipped Pot
desc: Evolves Sinistea → Polteageist (Chipped/Cracked form matters for value).

name: Choice Band
desc: Boosts Attack but locks the holder into one move.

name: Choice Scarf
desc: Boosts Speed but locks the holder into one move.

name: Choice Specs
desc: Boosts Special Attack but locks the holder into one move.

name: Cleanse Tag
desc: Reduces the rate of wild encounters while walking.

name: Clear Amulet
desc: Prevents the holder's stats from being lowered by opponents.

name: Covert Cloak
desc: Prevents secondary/additional effects of moves used on the holder.

name: Cracked Pot
desc: Evolves Sinistea → Polteageist (Chipped/Cracked form matters for value).

name: Damp Rock
desc: Extends the duration of Rain Dance.

name: Deep Sea Scale
desc: Evolves Clamperl → Gorebyss.

name: Deep Sea Tooth
desc: Evolves Clamperl → Huntail.

name: Destiny Knot
desc: Passes on more IVs when breeding; also links infatuation both ways in battle.

name: Dire Hit
desc: Raises the user's critical hit ratio in battle.

name: Dragon Fang
desc: Held item boosting Dragon-type moves.

name: Dragon Scale
desc: Evolves Seadra → Kingdra.

name: Dubious Disc
desc: Evolves Porygon2 → Porygon-Z.

name: Eject Button
desc: Switches the holder out after it's hit.

name: Eject Pack
desc: Switches the holder out after any of its stats drop.

name: Electirizer
desc: Evolves Electabuzz → Electivire.

name: Elixir
desc: Restores 10 PP to all moves.

name: Ether
desc: Restores 10 PP to one move.

name: Everstone
desc: Prevents evolution; passes down a specific nature when bred.

name: Eviolite
desc: Boosts Defense and Special Defense for Pokémon that can still evolve.

name: Evolution Stone
desc: Fire/Water/Thunder/Leaf/Moon/Sun/Shiny/Dusk/Ice/Dawn Stone — interact to trigger a stone evolution.

name: Exp. Candy
desc: Grants a set amount of experience points.

name: Exp. Share
desc: Held item that splits earned experience with the rest of the party.

name: Expert Belt
desc: Boosts moves that are super effective.

name: Fairy Feather
desc: Held item boosting Fairy-type moves.

name: Feather
desc: Held/consumed to permanently raise a specific stat by 1 EV point.

name: Fine Remedy
desc: Cures status conditions, mid-tier.

name: Flame Orb
desc: Burns the holder over time.

name: Float Stone
desc: Halves the holder's weight.

name: Focus Band
desc: Small chance to survive a KO hit with 1 HP.

name: Focus Sash
desc: Guarantees surviving a KO hit with 1 HP if at full HP.

name: Fossil
desc: Restore extinct Pokémon at a Fossil Machine — see this wiki's Fossils page for real combinations.

name: Full Heal
desc: Cures any status condition.

name: Full Restore
desc: Fully restores HP and cures any status condition.

name: Galarica Cuff
desc: Evolves Galarian Yamask → Runerigus condition item.

name: Galarica Nuts
desc: Crafts into Galarica Cuff/Wreath, used for Alolan/Galarian evolution items.

name: Galarica Wreath
desc: Evolves Galarian Slowpoke → Slowking (Galarian).

name: Grip Claw
desc: Extends binding-move duration to the maximum.

name: Guard Spec
desc: Prevents the user's side's stats from being lowered for 5 turns.

name: Hard Stone
desc: Held item boosting Rock-type moves.

name: Heal Powder
desc: Cures status conditions (Berry Powder line).

name: Hearty Grains
desc: A farmable feed crop.

name: Heat Rock
desc: Extends the duration of Sunny Day.

name: Heavy-Duty Boots
desc: Immunity to entry hazards.

name: Hyper Potion
desc: Restores 200 HP.

name: Hyper Training
desc: Maximizes an IV on a fully-leveled Pokémon.

name: Ice Heal
desc: Cures freeze.

name: Icy Rock
desc: Extends the duration of Hail/Snow.

name: Iron Ball
desc: Doubles the holder's weight and grounds Flying types.

name: Jubilife Muffin
desc: A Sinnoh (Hisui-era) snack food.

name: King's Rock
desc: Evolves Poliwhirl → Politoed and Slowpoke → Slowking when traded/used.

name: Lagging Tail
desc: Makes the holder move last in its priority bracket.

name: Lava Cookie
desc: A Hoenn regional snack that heals and cures status.

name: Leftovers
desc: Restores a small amount of HP every turn.

name: Life Orb
desc: Boosts move power at the cost of recoil damage.

name: Light Ball
desc: Sharply boosts Pikachu's Attack and Special Attack.

name: Light Clay
desc: Extends the duration of Reflect and Light Screen.

name: Link Cable
desc: Trade-evolution item usable without an actual trade.

name: Loaded Dice
desc: Improves the odds of multi-hit moves landing more hits.

name: Lucky Egg
desc: Held item that boosts experience gained in battle.

name: Luminous Moss
desc: One-use item boosting Special Defense after being hit by a Water move.

name: Lumiose Galette
desc: A Kalos regional snack food.

name: Magmarizer
desc: Evolves Magmar → Magmortar.

name: Magnet
desc: Held item boosting Electric-type moves.

name: Malicious Armor
desc: Evolves Charcadet → Ceruledge.

name: Masterpiece Teacup
desc: Evolves Poltchageist → Sinistcha (rare Unremarkable Masterpiece form).

name: Max Elixir
desc: Fully restores PP to all moves.

name: Max Ether
desc: Fully restores PP to one move.

name: Max Potion
desc: Fully restores HP.

name: Max Revive
desc: Revives a fainted Pokémon with full HP.

name: Medicinal Brew
desc: A brewed healing item.

name: Medicinal Leek
desc: A farmable crop used in several cooking recipes.

name: Mental Herb
desc: Held item that snaps a Pokémon out of infatuation, Taunt, Encore, and similar effects.

name: Metal Alloy
desc: Evolves Bisharp → Kingambit.

name: Metal Coat
desc: Evolves Onix → Steelix and Scyther → Scizor.

name: Metal Powder
desc: Boosts Ditto's Defense.

name: Metronome
desc: Power ramps up the longer the same move is used consecutively.

name: Miracle Seed
desc: Held item boosting Grass-type moves.

name: Mirror Herb
desc: Held item that copies an opponent's stat boost back onto the holder.

name: Moomoo Milk
desc: Restores HP when consumed by a Pokémon.

name: Mulch
desc: Farming material with soil/growth uses.

name: Muscle Band
desc: Held item that slightly boosts physical move power.

name: Mystic Water
desc: Held item boosting Water-type moves.

name: Never-Melt Ice
desc: Held item boosting Ice-type moves.

name: Old Gateau
desc: A Sinnoh regional snack that heals and cures status.

name: Open-Faced Sandwich
desc: A customizable sandwich food item.

name: Oval Stone
desc: Evolves Happiny → Chansey (during the day).

name: Paralyze Heal
desc: Cures paralysis.

name: Peat Block
desc: Evolution item for Ursaring → Ursaluna in Legends: Arceus style play.

name: Pep-Up Flower
desc: A farmable flower with cooking uses.

name: Pewter Crunchies
desc: A regional Kanto snack food.

name: Poison Barb
desc: Held item boosting Poison-type moves.

name: Poké Bait
desc: Thrown to attract wild Pokémon without battling.

name: Poké Ball
desc: The standard catching device — 1x catch rate, craftable from 4 red apricorns and a copper ingot.

name: Poké Cake
desc: A more advanced Campfire Pot food item.

name: Poké Snack
desc: Made in a Campfire Pot — attracts wild Pokémon when placed.

name: Ponigiri
desc: A regional snack food item.

name: Potato Mochi
desc: A regional snack food.

name: Potion
desc: Restores 20 HP.

name: Pottery Sherd
desc: A decorative archaeology find.

name: Power Herb
desc: Held item letting two-turn moves like Solar Beam fire in a single turn.

name: Prism Scale
desc: Evolves Feebas → Milotic.

name: Protective Pads
desc: Protects the holder from contact-move side effects.

name: Protector
desc: Evolves Rhydon → Rhyperior.

name: Punching Glove
desc: Boosts punching move power and removes their contact flag.

name: Quick Claw
desc: Occasional chance to move first regardless of Speed.

name: Quick Powder
desc: Boosts Ditto's Speed.

name: Rage Candy Bar
desc: A Johto regional snack that heals and cures status.

name: Rare Candy
desc: Instantly raises a Pokémon's level by one.

name: Razor Claw
desc: Evolves Sneasel → Weavile at night.

name: Razor Fang
desc: Evolves Gligar → Gliscor at night.

name: Reaper Cloth
desc: Evolves Dusclops → Dusknoir.

name: Red Card
desc: Forces the attacker to switch out after hitting the holder.

name: Relic Coin
desc: Gimmighoul-line currency item.

name: Remedy
desc: Cures status conditions.

name: Revival Herb
desc: Fully heals HP and cures status, but sharply lowers Friendship.

name: Revive
desc: Revives a fainted Pokémon with half HP.

name: Ring Target
desc: Removes one of the holder's type immunities.

name: Rocky Helmet
desc: Damages attackers that make contact with the holder.

name: Room Service
desc: Lowers Speed once under Trick Room.

name: Sachet
desc: Evolves Spritzee → Aromatisse.

name: Safety Goggles
desc: Protects from weather damage and powder moves.

name: Scope Lens
desc: Raises the holder's critical hit ratio.

name: Scroll of Darkness
desc: Evolves Kubfu → Urshifu (Single Strike Style).

name: Scroll of Waters
desc: Evolves Kubfu → Urshifu (Rapid Strike Style).

name: Sharp Beak
desc: Held item boosting Flying-type moves.

name: Shed Shell
desc: Guarantees the holder can switch out or flee.

name: Shell Bell
desc: Restores some HP to the holder based on damage it deals.

name: Shell Helmet
desc: Cosmetic/held item related to Clamperl-line Pokémon.

name: Silk Scarf
desc: Held item boosting Normal-type moves.

name: Silver Powder
desc: Held item boosting Bug-type moves.

name: Sinister Tea
desc: A themed food item.

name: Smithing Template
desc: Used for equipment/armor trim crafting.

name: Smoke Ball
desc: Guarantees escape from wild encounters.

name: Smoked-Tail Curry
desc: A Galar-style curry dish.

name: Smooth Rock
desc: Extends the duration of Sandstorm.

name: Soft Sand
desc: Held item boosting Ground-type moves.

name: Soothe Bell
desc: Increases the rate a Pokémon gains Friendship.

name: Spell Tag
desc: Held item boosting Ghost-type moves.

name: Sticky Barb
desc: Damages the holder each turn and can transfer via contact moves.

name: Super Potion
desc: Restores 50 HP.

name: Superb Remedy
desc: Cures status conditions and restores some HP.

name: Sweet Apple
desc: Evolves Applin → Appletun.

name: Syrupy Apple
desc: Evolves Dipplin → Hydrapple.

name: Tart Apple
desc: Evolves Applin → Flapple.

name: Tasty Tail
desc: A cooking/fishing-related consumable.

name: Terrain Extender
desc: Extends the duration of active terrain effects.
